channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US urges its citizens to leave Israel immediately amid strike threat on Iran
item.description: Department of State also authorises non-essential officials and their families to book flights anywhere Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get ...

item.title: Von der Leyen pushes through Mercosur deal, splitting European leaders – Europe live
item.description: Trade between the EU and two South American countries may start within two months under a provision application of the deal Trade between the EU and t...

item.title: Pakistan declares state of ‘open war’ after bombing major Afghan cities
item.description: Wave of strikes comes after Taliban forces attack Pakistani border troops following earlier action from Islamabad Pakistan has bombed major cities in ...

item.title: PM vows to ‘keep fighting’ after Greens sweep past Labour and Reform to win byelection – UK politics live
item.description: Green party’s Hannah Spencer secures victory in Gorton and Denton as Reform UK finish second and Labour is pushed into third Full story: Resounding vi...

item.title: Democrats outraged at US military’s downing of CBP drone near Mexico border
item.description: Second time in two weeks military used laser to attack what it mistakenly thought was a threat, disrupting air traffic Sign up for the Breaking News U...

item.title: Waitrose to suspend mackerel sales due to overfishing concerns
item.description: The supermarket chain says it will stop sourcing fresh, chilled and frozen mackerel by 29 April.

item.title: Starmer says he will fight on after by-election defeat to Greens
item.description: The result - in a seat Labour has held for nearly 100 years - has renewed criticism of Sir Keir's leadership from Labour MPs.

item.title: Reform UK reports by-election 'family voting' concerns to police
item.description: It comes after election observers raised concerns about "extremely high" levels of family voting.

item.title: How Hollywood and Maga aligned over Warner Bros deal
item.description: Paramount beats Netflix to the major deal, pleasing figures in DC and LA alike, the BBC's culture and media editor writes.

item.title: US embassy in Israel says non-emergency staff can leave the country
item.description: Washington's ambassador in Jerusalem reportedly told staff those wishing to leave should do so "today".
